summary: Plan-mode classification only. #92094 remains the live canonical issue for the Telegram proactive send failure. #92107 is the related candidate PR for that issue, but it is not merge-ready because hydrated checks include failures and the real-behavior-proof gate failed; no closure, merge, fix, or GitHub mutation is planned.
